title: Review
description: A code review in Helix Swarm, representing a set of changes under review with participants, votes, and state.

author.description: The username of the review author.

changes.description: List of changelist IDs associated with the review.

created.description: Unix timestamp when the review was created.

groups.description: Reviewer groups assigned to the review.

participants.description: Map of participant usernames to their participation details including votes and required status.

pending.description: Whether the review has a pending changelist.

projects.description: Map of project IDs to affected branch names.

roles.description: Map of roles to lists of usernames.

state.description: The current state of the review.

stateLabel.description: A display-friendly label for the current state.

updated.description: Unix timestamp when the review was last updated.

updateDate.description: ISO 8601 formatted date when the review was last updated.
